summary: Iteration 72: Password Reset Flow Testing Complete. All CRIT-001 fixes verified: (1) Forgot password link on login page works, (2) /reset-password page renders correctly with all data-testid attributes, (3) /update-password shows correct 'Verifying...' state when accessed without valid token, (4) Warmup uses warm-cognitive-engine endpoint, (5) Desktop layout has no horizontal scroll, (6) Login functionality works, (7) Mobile bottom nav is present in DOM.

issues: The Soundboard FAB appears as a blue circle at bottom-left corner. This is existing behavior from FloatingSoundboard component, not a regression from password reset changes.

data_testids_verified.password-loading: PASS - shows 'Verifying reset link...' without valid token

update_password_page.password_form_hidden: PASS - form not shown without valid token (expected)

warmup_endpoint.uses_warm_cognitive_engine: PASS - Line 130 in App.js calls warm-cognitive-engine

CRIT_001_forgot_password_flow.reset_page: PASS - /reset-password route works with Supabase resetPasswordForEmail
CRIT_001_forgot_password_flow.update_page: PASS - /update-password route shows loading state without token

HIGH_003_mobile_padding.login_page: PASS - px-6 sm:px-8 classes applied (24px on mobile)

LOW_002_warmup_endpoint.app_js: PASS - uses warm-cognitive-engine instead of previous endpoint

critical_code_review_comments: ResetPassword.js properly uses Supabase resetPasswordForEmail with redirectTo to /update-password
UpdatePassword.js correctly listens for PASSWORD_RECOVERY auth state change event
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Routes correctly added in App.js (lines 192-193) - not wrapped in PublicRoute which allows access during password recovery flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password reset flow iteration 72 complete. All CRIT-001, HIGH-003, LOW-002 fixes verified. Reset password uses Supabase resetPasswordForEmail - cannot test actual email sending but UI flow is correct. Update password page shows correct 'Verifying reset link...' state when accessed without valid Supabase PASSWORD_RECOVERY session.

mocked_api_confirmation.note: CRM (HubSpot) is REAL via Merge.dev. Password reset uses real Supabase Auth.
